method: GPS position + laser-rangefinder boresight + gimbal-stabilized roll -> pinhole projection to LRF-altitude ground plane
limitation: wide-baseline grazing oblique over 3D relief -> flat-plane ortho leaves height parallax; DEM/SfM needed for pixel-level multi-view fusion
orbit_relevance: ORBIT's high-altitude near-nadir line scanner has far less parallax, so this same telemetry-ortho front-end aligns cleanly at operational geometry
